回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文小說選讀 (Selected Reading in Novels)	開課班級 : 應英四乙	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 吳唯邦	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course delves into the ever-changing landscape of contemporary fiction. We'll explore critical issues shaping the genre, trace its historical development, and meet some of the most renowned authors who continue to push its boundaries. 


2.教學綱要
Engaging with the Text: Analyze, appreciate, and evaluate assigned novels through class discussions and written assignments.
Diversity and Representation: Enhance your understanding of literature by examining different voices and perspectives within the genre.
Literary and Social Contexts: Develop awareness of the social and cultural contexts that influence literature and its impact on society.
Close Reading and Literary Criticism: Conduct close readings of assigned texts to develop your analytical skills and practice literary criticism.
Understanding Readership and Trends: Comprehend the evolution of fiction by studying its target audience, historical trends, and adaptations across media.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Class Participation, Discussion, and Presentation 40%; Mid-term Exam: 30%; Final Exam 30% 
This course is not lecture-based. You will need to work as a group to interpret and to understand the weekly reading materials, and to begin to learn how to interpret and apply what you have learned.
